sections.title: Bracelets
sections: Themadhood's Bracelet Collection is a curated selection of handcrafted wristwear designed with both structure and individuality in mind. The collection includes a range of styles, from minimalist designs to more detailed, material-driven pieces. Some bracelets are presented as coordinated sets, while others stand as individual creations, offering a balance between cohesive collections and one-of-a-kind handmade work.

items.title: Paperclip Bracelet Collection
about: A collection of handcrafted bracelets made from paperclips, shaped and assembled into a refined design.
The original materials are transformed in a way that is not immediately recognizable.
description: These bracelets are constructed from paperclips that have been reworked into a smooth, cohesive form.
The finished pieces present a clean, polished look, with the underlying materials only apparent on closer inspection.

items.title: Poptab Bracelet Collection
about: A collection of handcrafted bracelets created using pop tab elements and woven connections.
description: These bracelets combine recycled materials with bold color pairings, resulting in distinctive pieces with a strong, handcrafted character.
